news.t: Franklin Templeton Expands Active ETF Lineup with Two New International Equity Strategies

holdings.infoBox: TINS is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics Co Ltd DR stock at 7.37%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.03%, AstraZeneca at 3.92%, BP p.l.c. at 3.51%, and Infineon Technologies AG at 3.24%.

overview.description: The Templeton International Insights ETF (TINS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing across all market capitalizations in equity securities of companies outside the United States. The fund seeks long-term growth of capital TINS was launched on Oct 21, 2025 and is issued by Templeton.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Expands Active ETF Lineup with Two New International Equity Strategies
data.text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Templeton today announced the launch of two new actively managed international equity ETFs designed to provide investors with distinct approaches to access...
